verses.text_hebrew: וְעָשָׂה֩ בְצַלְאֵ֨ל וְאׇהֳלִיאָ֜ב וְכֹ֣ל ׀ אִ֣ישׁ חֲכַם־לֵ֗ב אֲשֶׁר֩ נָתַ֨ן יְהֹוָ֜ה חׇכְמָ֤ה וּתְבוּנָה֙ בָּהֵ֔מָּה לָדַ֣עַת לַעֲשֹׂ֔ת אֶֽת־כׇּל־מְלֶ֖אכֶת עֲבֹדַ֣ת הַקֹּ֑דֶשׁ לְכֹ֥ל אֲשֶׁר־צִוָּ֖ה יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: Then wrought Bezaleel and Aholiab, and every wise hearted man, in whom the LORD put wisdom and understanding to know how to work all manner of work for the service of the sanctuary, according to all that the LORD had commanded.
verses.rendering: So wrought Bezaleel and Aholiab, and every wise hearted man, in whom the LORD put wisdom and understanding to know how to work all manner of work for the service of the sanctuary, according to all that the LORD had commanded.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיִּקְרָ֣א מֹשֶׁ֗ה אֶל־בְּצַלְאֵל֮ וְאֶל־אׇֽהֳלִיאָב֒ וְאֶל֙ כׇּל־אִ֣ישׁ חֲכַם־לֵ֔ב אֲשֶׁ֨ר נָתַ֧ן יְהֹוָ֛ה חׇכְמָ֖ה בְּלִבּ֑וֹ כֹּ֚ל אֲשֶׁ֣ר נְשָׂא֣וֹ לִבּ֔וֹ לְקׇרְבָ֥ה אֶל־הַמְּלָאכָ֖ה לַעֲשֹׂ֥ת אֹתָֽהּ׃
verses.text_kjv: And Moses called Bezaleel and Aholiab, and every wise hearted man, in whose heart the LORD had put wisdom, even every one whose heart stirred him up to come unto the work to do it:
verses.rendering: Moses called Bezaleel and Aholiab, and every wise hearted man, in whose heart the LORD had put wisdom, even every one whose heart stirred him up to come to the work to do it:
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיִּקְח֞וּ מִלִּפְנֵ֣י מֹשֶׁ֗ה אֵ֤ת כׇּל־הַתְּרוּמָה֙ אֲשֶׁ֨ר הֵבִ֜יאוּ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל לִמְלֶ֛אכֶת עֲבֹדַ֥ת הַקֹּ֖דֶשׁ לַעֲשֹׂ֣ת אֹתָ֑הּ וְ֠הֵ֠ם הֵבִ֨יאוּ אֵלָ֥יו ע֛וֹד נְדָבָ֖ה בַּבֹּ֥קֶר בַּבֹּֽקֶר׃
verses.text_kjv: And they received of Moses all the offering, which the children of Israel had brought for the work of the service of the sanctuary, to make it withal. And they brought yet unto him free offerings every morning.
verses.rendering: they received of Moses all the offering, which the children of Israel had brought for the work of the service of the sanctuary, to make it withal. And they brought yet to him free offerings every morning.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיָּבֹ֙אוּ֙ כׇּל־הַ֣חֲכָמִ֔ים הָעֹשִׂ֕ים אֵ֖ת כׇּל־מְלֶ֣אכֶת הַקֹּ֑דֶשׁ אִֽישׁ־אִ֥ישׁ מִמְּלַאכְתּ֖וֹ אֲשֶׁר־הֵ֥מָּה עֹשִֽׂים׃
verses.text_kjv: And all the wise men, that wrought all the work of the sanctuary, came every man from his work which they made;
verses.rendering: all the wise men, that wrought all the work of the sanctuary, came every man from his work which they made;
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיֹּאמְרוּ֙ אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֣ה לֵּאמֹ֔ר מַרְבִּ֥ים הָעָ֖ם לְהָבִ֑יא מִדֵּ֤י הָֽעֲבֹדָה֙ לַמְּלָאכָ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה לַעֲשֹׂ֥ת אֹתָֽהּ׃
verses.text_kjv: And they spake unto Moses, saying, The people bring much more than enough for the service of the work, which the LORD commanded to make.
verses.rendering: they spake to Moses, saying, The people bring much more than enough for the service of the work, which the LORD commanded to make.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיְצַ֣ו מֹשֶׁ֗ה וַיַּעֲבִ֨ירוּ ק֥וֹל בַּֽמַּחֲנֶה֮ לֵאמֹר֒ אִ֣ישׁ וְאִשָּׁ֗ה אַל־יַעֲשׂוּ־ע֛וֹד מְלָאכָ֖ה לִתְרוּמַ֣ת הַקֹּ֑דֶשׁ וַיִּכָּלֵ֥א הָעָ֖ם מֵהָבִֽיא׃
verses.text_kjv: And Moses gave commandment, and they caused it to be proclaimed throughout the camp, saying, Let neither man nor woman make any more work for the offering of the sanctuary. So the people were restrained from bringing.
verses.rendering: Moses gave commandment, and they caused it to be proclaimed throughout the camp, saying, Let neither man nor woman make any more work for the offering of the sanctuary. So the people were restrained from bringing.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְהַמְּלָאכָ֗ה הָיְתָ֥ה דַיָּ֛ם לְכׇל־הַמְּלָאכָ֖ה לַעֲשׂ֣וֹת אֹתָ֑הּ וְהוֹתֵֽר׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: For the stuff they had was sufficient for all the work to make it, and too much.
verses.rendering: For the stuff they had was sufficient for all the work to make it, and too much.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּעֲשׂ֨וּ כׇל־חֲכַם־לֵ֜ב בְּעֹשֵׂ֧י הַמְּלָאכָ֛ה אֶת־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֖ן עֶ֣שֶׂר יְרִיעֹ֑ת שֵׁ֣שׁ מׇשְׁזָ֗ר וּתְכֵ֤לֶת וְאַרְגָּמָן֙ וְתוֹלַ֣עַת שָׁנִ֔י כְּרֻבִ֛ים מַעֲשֵׂ֥ה חֹשֵׁ֖ב עָשָׂ֥ה אֹתָֽם׃
verses.text_kjv: And every wise hearted man among them that wrought the work of the tabernacle made ten curtains of fine twined linen, and blue, and purple, and scarlet: with cherubims of cunning work made he them.
verses.rendering: every wise hearted man among them that wrought the work of the tabernacle made ten curtains of fine twined linen, and blue, and purple, and scarlet: with cherubims of cunning work made he them.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: אֹ֜רֶךְ הַיְרִיעָ֣ה הָֽאַחַ֗ת שְׁמֹנֶ֤ה וְעֶשְׂרִים֙ בָּֽאַמָּ֔ה וְרֹ֙חַב֙ אַרְבַּ֣ע בָּֽאַמָּ֔ה הַיְרִיעָ֖ה הָאֶחָ֑ת מִדָּ֥ה אַחַ֖ת לְכׇל־הַיְרִיעֹֽת׃
verses.text_kjv: The length of one curtain was twenty and eight cubits, and the breadth of one curtain four cubits: the curtains were all of one size.
verses.rendering: The length of one curtain was twenty and eight cubits, and the breadth of one curtain four cubits: the curtains were all of one size.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיְחַבֵּר֙ אֶת־חֲמֵ֣שׁ הַיְרִיעֹ֔ת אַחַ֖ת אֶל־אֶחָ֑ת וְחָמֵ֤שׁ יְרִיעֹת֙ חִבַּ֔ר אַחַ֖ת אֶל־אֶחָֽת׃
verses.text_kjv: And he coupled the five curtains one unto another: and the other five curtains he coupled one unto another.
verses.rendering: he coupled the five curtains one to another: and the other five curtains he coupled one to another.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֜עַשׂ לֻֽלְאֹ֣ת תְּכֵ֗לֶת עַ֣ל שְׂפַ֤ת הַיְרִיעָה֙ הָֽאֶחָ֔ת מִקָּצָ֖ה בַּמַּחְבָּ֑רֶת כֵּ֤ן עָשָׂה֙ בִּשְׂפַ֣ת הַיְרִיעָ֔ה הַקִּ֣יצוֹנָ֔ה בַּמַּחְבֶּ֖רֶת הַשֵּׁנִֽית׃
verses.text_kjv: And he made loops of blue on the edge of one curtain from the selvedge in the coupling: likewise he made in the uttermost side of another curtain, in the coupling of the second.
verses.rendering: he made loops of blue on the edge of one curtain from the selvedge in the coupling: likewise he made in the uttermost side of another curtain, in the coupling of the second.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: חֲמִשִּׁ֣ים לֻלָאֹ֗ת עָשָׂה֮ בַּיְרִיעָ֣ה הָאֶחָת֒ וַחֲמִשִּׁ֣ים לֻלָאֹ֗ת עָשָׂה֙ בִּקְצֵ֣ה הַיְרִיעָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֖ר בַּמַּחְבֶּ֣רֶת הַשֵּׁנִ֑ית מַקְבִּילֹת֙ הַלֻּ֣לָאֹ֔ת אַחַ֖ת אֶל־אֶחָֽת׃
verses.text_kjv: Fifty loops made he in one curtain, and fifty loops made he in the edge of the curtain which was in the coupling of the second: the loops held one curtain to another.
verses.rendering: Fifty loops made he in one curtain, and fifty loops made he in the edge of the curtain which was in the coupling of the second: the loops held one curtain to another.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֕עַשׂ חֲמִשִּׁ֖ים קַרְסֵ֣י זָהָ֑ב וַיְחַבֵּ֨ר אֶת־הַיְרִיעֹ֜ת אַחַ֤ת אֶל־אַחַת֙ בַּקְּרָסִ֔ים וַיְהִ֥י הַמִּשְׁכָּ֖ן אֶחָֽד׃ {פ}
verses.text_kjv: And he made fifty taches of gold, and coupled the curtains one unto another with the taches: so it became one tabernacle.
verses.rendering: he made fifty taches of gold, and coupled the curtains one to another with the taches: so it became one tabernacle.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֙עַשׂ֙ יְרִיעֹ֣ת עִזִּ֔ים לְאֹ֖הֶל עַל־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֑ן עַשְׁתֵּֽי־עֶשְׂרֵ֥ה יְרִיעֹ֖ת עָשָׂ֥ה אֹתָֽם׃
verses.text_kjv: And he made curtains of goats’ hair for the tent over the tabernacle: eleven curtains he made them.
verses.rendering: he made curtains of goats’ hair for the tent over the tabernacle: eleven curtains he made them.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: אֹ֜רֶךְ הַיְרִיעָ֣ה הָאַחַ֗ת שְׁלֹשִׁים֙ בָּֽאַמָּ֔ה וְאַרְבַּ֣ע אַמּ֔וֹת רֹ֖חַב הַיְרִיעָ֣ה הָאֶחָ֑ת מִדָּ֣ה אַחַ֔ת לְעַשְׁתֵּ֥י עֶשְׂרֵ֖ה יְרִיעֹֽת׃
verses.text_kjv: The length of one curtain was thirty cubits, and four cubits was the breadth of one curtain: the eleven curtains were of one size.
verses.rendering: The length of one curtain was thirty cubits, and four cubits was the breadth of one curtain: the eleven curtains were of one size.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיְחַבֵּ֛ר אֶת־חֲמֵ֥שׁ הַיְרִיעֹ֖ת לְבָ֑ד וְאֶת־שֵׁ֥שׁ הַיְרִיעֹ֖ת לְבָֽד׃
verses.text_kjv: And he coupled five curtains by themselves, and six curtains by themselves.
verses.rendering: he coupled five curtains by themselves, and six curtains by themselves.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֜עַשׂ לֻֽלָאֹ֣ת חֲמִשִּׁ֗ים עַ֚ל שְׂפַ֣ת הַיְרִיעָ֔ה הַקִּיצֹנָ֖ה בַּמַּחְבָּ֑רֶת וַחֲמִשִּׁ֣ים לֻלָאֹ֗ת עָשָׂה֙ עַל־שְׂפַ֣ת הַיְרִיעָ֔ה הַחֹבֶ֖רֶת הַשֵּׁנִֽית׃
verses.text_kjv: And he made fifty loops upon the uttermost edge of the curtain in the coupling, and fifty loops made he upon the edge of the curtain which coupleth the second.
verses.rendering: he made fifty loops upon the uttermost edge of the curtain in the coupling, and fifty loops made he upon the edge of the curtain which coupleth the second.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֛עַשׂ קַרְסֵ֥י נְחֹ֖שֶׁת חֲמִשִּׁ֑ים לְחַבֵּ֥ר אֶת־הָאֹ֖הֶל לִהְיֹ֥ת אֶחָֽד׃
verses.text_kjv: And he made fifty taches of brass to couple the tent together, that it might be one.
verses.rendering: he made fifty taches of brass to couple the tent together, that it might be one.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֤עַשׂ מִכְסֶה֙ לָאֹ֔הֶל עֹרֹ֥ת אֵילִ֖ם מְאׇדָּמִ֑ים וּמִכְסֵ֛ה עֹרֹ֥ת תְּחָשִׁ֖ים מִלְמָֽעְלָה׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: And he made a covering for the tent of rams’ skins dyed red, and a covering of badgers’ skins above that.
verses.rendering: he made a covering for the tent of rams’ skins dyed red, and a covering of badgers’ skins above that.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ אֶת־הַקְּרָשִׁ֖ים לַמִּשְׁכָּ֑ן עֲצֵ֥י שִׁטִּ֖ים עֹמְדִֽים׃
verses.text_kjv: And he made boards for the tabernacle of shittim wood, standing up.
verses.rendering: he made boards for the tabernacle of shittim wood, standing up.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: עֶ֥שֶׂר אַמֹּ֖ת אֹ֣רֶךְ הַקָּ֑רֶשׁ וְאַמָּה֙ וַחֲצִ֣י הָֽאַמָּ֔ה רֹ֖חַב הַקֶּ֥רֶשׁ הָאֶחָֽד׃
verses.text_kjv: The length of a board was ten cubits, and the breadth of a board one cubit and a half.
verses.rendering: The length of a board was ten cubits, and the breadth of a board one cubit and a half.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: שְׁתֵּ֣י יָדֹ֗ת לַקֶּ֙רֶשׁ֙ הָֽאֶחָ֔ד מְשֻׁ֨לָּבֹ֔ת אַחַ֖ת אֶל־אֶחָ֑ת כֵּ֣ן עָשָׂ֔ה לְכֹ֖ל קַרְשֵׁ֥י הַמִּשְׁכָּֽן׃
verses.text_kjv: One board had two tenons, equally distant one from another: thus did he make for all the boards of the tabernacle.
verses.rendering: One board had two tenons, equally distant one from another: thus did he make for all the boards of the tabernacle.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ אֶת־הַקְּרָשִׁ֖ים לַמִּשְׁכָּ֑ן עֶשְׂרִ֣ים קְרָשִׁ֔ים לִפְאַ֖ת נֶ֥גֶב תֵּימָֽנָה׃
verses.text_kjv: And he made boards for the tabernacle; twenty boards for the south side southward:
verses.rendering: he made boards for the tabernacle; twenty boards for the south side southward:
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְאַרְבָּעִים֙ אַדְנֵי־כֶ֔סֶף עָשָׂ֕ה תַּ֖חַת עֶשְׂרִ֣ים הַקְּרָשִׁ֑ים שְׁנֵ֨י אֲדָנִ֜ים תַּֽחַת־הַקֶּ֤רֶשׁ הָאֶחָד֙ לִשְׁתֵּ֣י יְדֹתָ֔יו וּשְׁנֵ֧י אֲדָנִ֛ים תַּֽחַת־הַקֶּ֥רֶשׁ הָאֶחָ֖ד לִשְׁתֵּ֥י יְדֹתָֽיו׃
verses.text_kjv: And forty sockets of silver he made under the twenty boards; two sockets under one board for his two tenons, and two sockets under another board for his two tenons.
verses.rendering: forty sockets of silver he made under the twenty boards; two sockets under one board for his two tenons, and two sockets under another board for his two tenons.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וּלְצֶ֧לַע הַמִּשְׁכָּ֛ן הַשֵּׁנִ֖ית לִפְאַ֣ת צָפ֑וֹן עָשָׂ֖ה עֶשְׂרִ֥ים קְרָשִֽׁים׃
verses.text_kjv: And for the other side of the tabernacle, which is toward the north corner, he made twenty boards,
verses.rendering: for the other side of the tabernacle, which is toward the north corner, he made twenty boards,
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְאַרְבָּעִ֥ים אַדְנֵיהֶ֖ם כָּ֑סֶף שְׁנֵ֣י אֲדָנִ֗ים תַּ֚חַת הַקֶּ֣רֶשׁ הָאֶחָ֔ד וּשְׁנֵ֣י אֲדָנִ֔ים תַּ֖חַת הַקֶּ֥רֶשׁ הָאֶחָֽד׃
verses.text_kjv: And their forty sockets of silver; two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.
verses.rendering: their forty sockets of silver; two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וּֽלְיַרְכְּתֵ֥י הַמִּשְׁכָּ֖ן יָ֑מָּה עָשָׂ֖ה שִׁשָּׁ֥ה קְרָשִֽׁים׃
verses.text_kjv: And for the sides of the tabernacle westward he made six boards.
verses.rendering: for the sides of the tabernacle westward he made six boards.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וּשְׁנֵ֤י קְרָשִׁים֙ עָשָׂ֔ה לִמְקֻצְעֹ֖ת הַמִּשְׁכָּ֑ן בַּיַּרְכָתָֽיִם׃
verses.text_kjv: And two boards made he for the corners of the tabernacle in the two sides.
verses.rendering: two boards made he for the corners of the tabernacle in the two sides.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְהָי֣וּ תוֹאֲמִם֮ מִלְּמַ֒טָּה֒ וְיַחְדָּ֗ו יִהְי֤וּ תַמִּים֙ אֶל־רֹאשׁ֔וֹ אֶל־הַטַּבַּ֖עַת הָאֶחָ֑ת כֵּ֚ן עָשָׂ֣ה לִשְׁנֵיהֶ֔ם לִשְׁנֵ֖י הַמִּקְצֹעֹֽת׃
verses.text_kjv: And they were coupled beneath, and coupled together at the head thereof, to one ring: thus he did to both of them in both the corners.
verses.rendering: they were coupled beneath, and coupled together at the head thereof, to one ring: thus he did to both of them in both the corners.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְהָיוּ֙ שְׁמֹנָ֣ה קְרָשִׁ֔ים וְאַדְנֵיהֶ֣ם כֶּ֔סֶף שִׁשָּׁ֥ה עָשָׂ֖ר אֲדָנִ֑ים שְׁנֵ֤י אֲדָנִים֙ שְׁנֵ֣י אֲדָנִ֔ים תַּ֖חַת הַקֶּ֥רֶשׁ הָאֶחָֽד׃
verses.text_kjv: And there were eight boards; and their sockets were sixteen sockets of silver, under every board two sockets.
verses.rendering: there were eight boards; and their sockets were sixteen sockets of silver, under every board two sockets.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ בְּרִיחֵ֖י עֲצֵ֣י שִׁטִּ֑ים חֲמִשָּׁ֕ה לְקַרְשֵׁ֥י צֶֽלַע־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֖ן הָאֶחָֽת׃
verses.text_kjv: And he made bars of shittim wood; five for the boards of the one side of the tabernacle,
verses.rendering: he made bars of shittim wood; five for the boards of the one side of the tabernacle,
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַחֲמִשָּׁ֣ה בְרִיחִ֔ם לְקַרְשֵׁ֥י צֶֽלַע־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֖ן הַשֵּׁנִ֑ית וַחֲמִשָּׁ֤ה בְרִיחִם֙ לְקַרְשֵׁ֣י הַמִּשְׁכָּ֔ן לַיַּרְכָתַ֖יִם יָֽמָּה׃
verses.text_kjv: And five bars for the boards of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the boards of the tabernacle for the sides westward.
verses.rendering: five bars for the boards of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the boards of the tabernacle for the sides westward.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֖עַשׂ אֶת־הַבְּרִ֣יחַ הַתִּיכֹ֑ן לִבְרֹ֙חַ֙ בְּת֣וֹךְ הַקְּרָשִׁ֔ים מִן־הַקָּצֶ֖ה אֶל־הַקָּצֶֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: And he made the middle bar to shoot through the boards from the one end to the other.
verses.rendering: he made the middle bar to shoot through the boards from the one end to the other.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְֽאֶת־הַקְּרָשִׁ֞ים צִפָּ֣ה זָהָ֗ב וְאֶת־טַבְּעֹתָם֙ עָשָׂ֣ה זָהָ֔ב בָּתִּ֖ים לַבְּרִיחִ֑ם וַיְצַ֥ף אֶת־הַבְּרִיחִ֖ם זָהָֽב׃
verses.text_kjv: And he overlaid the boards with gold, and made their rings of gold to be places for the bars, and overlaid the bars with gold.
verses.rendering: he overlaid the boards with gold, and made their rings of gold to be places for the bars, and overlaid the bars with gold.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֙עַשׂ֙ אֶת־הַפָּרֹ֔כֶת תְּכֵ֧לֶת וְאַרְגָּמָ֛ן וְתוֹלַ֥עַת שָׁנִ֖י וְשֵׁ֣שׁ מׇשְׁזָ֑ר מַעֲשֵׂ֥ה חֹשֵׁ֛ב עָשָׂ֥ה אֹתָ֖הּ כְּרֻבִֽים׃
verses.text_kjv: And he made a vail of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen: with cherubims made he it of cunning work.
verses.rendering: he made a vail of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen: with cherubims made he it of cunning work.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֣עַשׂ לָ֗הּ אַרְבָּעָה֙ עַמּוּדֵ֣י שִׁטִּ֔ים וַיְצַפֵּ֣ם זָהָ֔ב וָוֵיהֶ֖ם זָהָ֑ב וַיִּצֹ֣ק לָהֶ֔ם אַרְבָּעָ֖ה אַדְנֵי־כָֽסֶף׃
verses.text_kjv: And he made thereunto four pillars of shittim wood, and overlaid them with gold: their hooks were of gold; and he cast for them four sockets of silver.
verses.rendering: he made thereto four pillars of shittim wood, and overlaid them with gold: their hooks were of gold; and he cast for them four sockets of silver.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֤עַשׂ מָסָךְ֙ לְפֶ֣תַח הָאֹ֔הֶל תְּכֵ֧לֶת וְאַרְגָּמָ֛ן וְתוֹלַ֥עַת שָׁנִ֖י וְשֵׁ֣שׁ מׇשְׁזָ֑ר מַעֲשֵׂ֖ה רֹקֵֽם׃
verses.text_kjv: And he made an hanging for the tabernacle door of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, of needlework;
verses.rendering: he made an hanging for the tabernacle door of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, of needlework;
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְאֶת־עַמּוּדָ֤יו חֲמִשָּׁה֙ וְאֶת־וָ֣וֵיהֶ֔ם וְצִפָּ֧ה רָאשֵׁיהֶ֛ם וַחֲשֻׁקֵיהֶ֖ם זָהָ֑ב וְאַדְנֵיהֶ֥ם חֲמִשָּׁ֖ה נְחֹֽשֶׁת׃ {פ}
verses.text_kjv: And the five pillars of it with their hooks: and he overlaid their chapiters and their fillets with gold: but their five sockets were of brass.
verses.rendering: the five pillars of it with their hooks: and he overlaid their chapiters and their fillets with gold: but their five sockets were of brass.
translator_notes: Tabernacle construction/service detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in final review pass.
